description: Activates the contradiction workflow by replacing the stub scout_contradictions with a real implementation that queries edges.db for contradicts edges, and adds the lithos_conflict_resolve MCP tool for resolving contradictions with tracked states.

userStories.title: Add get_edge method to EdgeStore
userStories.description: As the conflict resolution tool, I want an EdgeStore.get_edge(edge_id) method so I can look up a specific edge by its ID.
acceptanceCriteria: EdgeStore gains get_edge(edge_id: str) -> dict | None that returns the edge row as a dict or None if not found
Unit test: insert an edge, verify get_edge returns the correct dict with all fields
Unit test: get_edge for a non-existent edge_id returns None
make check passes

userStories.title: Add supersedes parameter to KnowledgeManager.update()
userStories.description: As the conflict resolution tool, I want KnowledgeManager.update() to accept a supersedes parameter so I can record which note supersedes another.
acceptanceCriteria: KnowledgeManager.update() gains supersedes: str | None | _UnsetType = _UNSET parameter, following the same pattern as source_url and other optional string fields
When supersedes is set, it is threaded through to metadata.supersedes and written to frontmatter
When supersedes is _UNSET, the existing value is preserved (not overwritten)
Unit test: update a note with supersedes set, verify frontmatter contains supersedes field
Unit test: update a note without passing supersedes, verify existing supersedes value is preserved
make check passes

userStories.title: Activate scout_contradictions
userStories.description: As the retrieval pipeline, I want to query edges.db for type=contradicts edges connected to top results, so that surface_conflicts=True actually surfaces contradictions.
acceptanceCriteria: scout_contradictions in scouts.py is replaced with a real implementation with signature: scout_contradictions(seed_ids, edge_store, knowledge, *, namespace_filter, agent_id, task_id) -> list[dict]
Queries EdgeStore.list_edges(from_id=node_id, edge_type='contradicts') and EdgeStore.list_edges(to_id=node_id, edge_type='contradicts') for each seed node
Returns list of dicts: {'edge_id': str, 'from_id': str, 'to_id': str, 'conflict_state': str | None} for edges where conflict_state is NULL or not in ('superseded', 'refuted', 'merged')

Before including a conflict, verifies the counterpart note passes: _passes_namespace_filter(), _passes_access_scope(), _passes_status_filter(exclude_status=['quarantined']), and exists in KnowledgeManager
run_retrieve passes seed nodes, edge_store, knowledge, and gating parameters to the activated scout; populates conflicts_surfaced in the receipt
When surface_conflicts=False (default), the scout is still a no-op
When surface_conflicts=True, conflicts appear in the response envelope under a conflicts key
Update existing test_returns_empty_list (tests/test_scouts.py) to match new scout_contradictions signature
Unit test: seeded contradiction edge verifies surfacing
Unit test: surface_conflicts=False verifies no-op
Unit test: contradiction edge pointing to a note in a different namespace is excluded when namespace_filter is set
Unit test: contradiction edge pointing to a quarantined note is excluded
make check passes

userStories.title: lithos_conflict_resolve MCP tool
userStories.description: As an agent or user, I want to resolve a contradiction between two notes by setting a resolution state, so that the conflict is tracked and future retrieval reflects the resolution.
acceptanceCriteria: New MCP tool lithos_conflict_resolve(edge_id: str, resolution: str, resolver: str, winner_id: str | None = None) -> dict registered in server.py
resolution must be one of: 'accepted_dual', 'superseded', 'refuted', 'merged' — rejects others with error envelope
resolution with invalid value raises error with descriptive message
Tool updates the edge's conflict_state to the resolution value, provenance_actor to resolver, and updated_at to now
When resolution is 'superseded', winner_id is required and must equal either from_id or to_id of the edge; rejects with error otherwise
When resolution is 'superseded', sets supersedes on the winning note to point to the losing note via KnowledgeManager.update()
Tool returns {'status': 'ok', 'edge_id': ..., 'conflict_state': ...} on success
Returns error envelope when edge not found or edge type is not 'contradicts'
Emits EDGE_UPSERTED event after resolution
Unit test: resolve with each valid resolution state
Unit test: reject invalid resolution string
Unit test: reject non-contradiction edge
Unit test: reject superseded resolution without valid winner_id
make check passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-001 (get_edge method) and US-002 (supersedes parameter)
